title: Evidence Truth Model
description: Extend rt-correlation::model::Finding with summary, explanation, confidence, assertion_level (Observed/Correlated/Inferred), and evidence_rendered fields. Update correlation engine outputs and CLI rendering.
acceptance_criteria: AssertionLevel enum exists with Observed, Correlated, Inferred variants
Finding struct has: summary: String, explanation: String, confidence: u8, assertion_level: AssertionLevel, evidence_rendered: Vec<String>
Rule YAML schema supports assertion_level, default_confidence, summary_template, explanation_template fields
All existing bundled rules load without error after schema extension
cargo test -p rt-correlation passes with new fields
